questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Were you at school yesterday? ___"
questions.answer: No, I wasn't. I was at home.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Was the food good? ___"
questions.answer: Yes, it was. It was very nice.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Were your friends at the party? ___"
questions.answer: No, they weren't. They were busy.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Was the film long? ___"
questions.answer: Yes, it was. It was two hours.

questions.prompt: Complete the sentence: "Were you and Tom in the same class? ___"
questions.answer: Yes, we were. We were together for two years.

questions.prompt: I _____ very tired last night, so I went to bed early.
questions.answer: was

questions.prompt: My parents _____ at work all day yesterday.
questions.answer: were

questions.prompt: The test _____ not very hard. I finished in ten minutes.
questions.answer: was

questions.prompt: _____ you at home last night? I called but you weren't there.
questions.answer: Were

questions.prompt: Tom and Lisa _____ late for class this morning.
questions.answer: were

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "The party was fun and all my friends was there."
questions.answer: 'My friends' is plural and takes 'were': 'all my friends were there.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "We were at the beach all morning but the water were very cold."
questions.answer: 'The water' is singular and takes 'was': 'the water was very cold.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "I was hungry after school so I were happy to eat dinner."
questions.answer: 'I' takes 'was', not 'were': 'so I was happy to eat dinner.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "My mum and dad were at work and my sister were at home alone."
questions.answer: 'My sister' is singular and takes 'was': 'my sister was at home alone.'

questions.prompt: Find the mistake: "Yesterday was a good day but the weather wasn't great — it were very windy."
questions.answer: 'It' takes 'was': 'it was very windy.'
We were at the park yesterday.
Were you at the game last night?
She wasn't in class.
It was cold and wet today.
Were your teachers nice at your old school?
